title: joy
summary:
Joy is a tiny creative coding library in Python. 
 Joy is a tiny creative coding library in Python. The easiest way to install it is download joy.py and place it in your directory. The library has no dependencies. It can be downloaded from Joy uses a canvas with 0, 0 as the center of the canvas. By default, the size of the canvas is 300, 300.

title: nannou
summary:
A Creative Coding Framework for Rust. 
 !nannoulogohttpsi.imgur.com1ldLFfj.png An open-source creative-coding toolkit for Rust. nannou is a collection of code aimed at making it easy for artists to express themselves with simple, fast, reliable, portable code. Whether working on a 12-month installation or a 5 minute sketch, this framework aims to give artists easy access to the tools they need.

title: quil
summary:
Main repo. Quil source code. 
 httpquil.info Quil looked up in shock to see Bigelow floating high in the clouds, his balloons rustling merrily in the wind. He gruffed to her from above, This truly is a party!. Image after image, vista after vista, passed furry Bige's wide-open eyes. A deep underlying beauty unfolded before him. A flock of bezier gulls whistled past. title: p5.js
summary:
p5.js is a client-side JS platform that empowers artists, designers, students, and anyone to learn to code and express themselves creatively on the web. It is based on the core principles of Processing. http://twitter.com/p5xjs  
 Welcome! p5.js is a free and open-source JavaScript library for accessiblehttpsp5js.orgcontributeaccess creative coding. It is a nurturing community, an approachable language, an exploratory tool, an accessible environment, an inclusive platform, welcoming and playful
